nasb.text: Then Joab said to the man who had told him, “Now behold, you saw him! Why then did you not strike him there to the ground? And I would have given you ten pieces of silver and a belt.”

esv.text: Joab said to the man who told him, “What, you saw him! Why then did you not strike him there to the ground? I would have been glad to give you ten pieces of silver and a belt.”

cnv.text: 約押對那向他報告的人說：“你既然看見了，為甚麼不當場把他擊殺，落在地上呢？那樣，我就賞賜你一百一十四克銀子和一條腰帶。”

ccb.text: 约押对那报信的说：“什么！你看见他吊在树上，为什么不把他杀掉呢？要是你把他杀了，我会赏你十块银子和一条腰带。”
